{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Civil Engineer",
  "description": "Eko Maintenance Limited is a rapidly growing Facility Management Company that specializes in the maintenance of high-rise building facilities with an office located in Victoria Island, Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The ideal candidate will be responsible for overseeing the design, construction, and maintenance of infrastructure project.


Responsibilities


	Manage, supervise, and coordinate a 10-man team that specializes in construction and finishing.
	Maintenance of high-rise buildings
	Ensure that the structure is safe, stable and meet engineering standards
	Installation of aluminum/glass, finishing of doors and windows partition.
	Monitor maintenance work and distribute tasks to subordinates accordingly.
	Contractor management such as contractor sourcing, pricing and tendering to completion.


Relevant work experience/Qualifications


	Candidates should possess HND / B.Sc Degree in Civil Engineering (Master&rsquo;s Degree in Civil Engineering or an associated field is an additional advantage).
	4 &ndash; 6 years of relevant work experience.
	Must have hands on experience in finishing buildings and construction.
	Knowledge and proficiency in industry-specific software, like AutoCAD Civil 3D, and other computer-aided design software..
	Good communication and team collaboration skills.


Salary &amp; Benefits


	Salary: N270,00-N300,000 monthly
	HMO Coverage
	Pension.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment3@ekomaintenance.com&nbsp;using &quot;Civil Engineer&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Civil Engineer Job at Eko Maintenance Limited




        
    

        
        Eko Maintenance Limited is a rapidly growing Facility Management Company that specializes in the maintenance of high-rise building facilities with an office located in Victoria Island, Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The ideal candidate will be responsible for overseeing the design, construction, and maintenance of infrastructure project.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage, supervise, and coordinate a 10-man team that specializes in construction and finishing.
	Maintenance of high-rise buildings
	Ensure that the structure is safe, stable and meet engineering standards
	Installation of aluminum/glass, finishing of doors and windows partition.
	Monitor maintenance work and distribute tasks to subordinates accordingly.
	Contractor management such as contractor sourcing, pricing and tendering to completion.


Relevant work experience/Qualifications


	Candidates should possess HND / B.Sc Degree in Civil Engineering (Master’s Degree in Civil Engineering or an associated field is an additional advantage).
	4 – 6 years of relevant work experience.
	Must have hands on experience in finishing buildings and construction.
	Knowledge and proficiency in industry-specific software, like AutoCAD Civil 3D, and other computer-aided design software..
	Good communication and team collaboration skills.


Salary & Benefits


	Salary: N270,00-N300,000 monthly
	HMO Coverage
	Pension.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Civil Engineer" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "AI Specialist Engineer",
  "description": "Uniccon Group of Companies a leading African tech conglomerate revolutionizing industries through cutting-edge AI, robotics, drone technology, and smart enterprise solutions. We are dedicated to shaping the future of technology, delivering value to businesses, governments, and individuals across the continent and beyond.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: AI Specialist Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time / Hybrid / Contract

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly skilled AI Specialist Engineer to design, develop, and deploy advanced artificial intelligence solutions that address complex business challenges.
	This role combines technical expertise, leadership capability, and strategic thinking to translate business problems into scalable AI-powered solutions.
	The successful candidate will lead the development of machine learning systems and collaborate with engineering teams to integrate AI capabilities into mobile and backend platforms.


Key Responsibilities
Technical Leadership:


	Lead the architecture, development, and deployment of AI and machine learning solutions.
	Design scalable AI systems, including:
	Natural Language Processing (NLP)
	Machine Learning models
	Deep Learning architectures
	Generative AI models
	Oversee the full AI development lifecycle, including:
	Data collection
	Data preprocessing
	Feature engineering
	Model training pipelines
	Ensure model optimization, performance tuning, and continuous monitoring in production environments.
	Guide the development and implementation of AI APIs and microservices for integration with mobile applications and backend systems.


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s or Master&rsquo;s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or a related field.
	Minimum of 5+ years of experience in AI/ML development.
	At least 2+ years of experience leading or managing technical teams.
	Strong proficiency in Python for machine learning and AI development.


Experience working with AI/ML frameworks such as:


	TensorFlow
	PyTorch
	Scikit-learn
	Strong understanding of:
	Natural Language Processing (NLP)
	Deep Learning techniques
	Predictive modeling
	Experience building and integrating REST APIs with backend systems.
	Knowledge of cloud platforms and containerization technologies, including:
	Docker
	Kubernetes
	Experience using Git and CI/CD pipelines for development and deployment workflows.


Preferred Qualifications


	Experience working with&nbsp;conversational AI systems and Large Language Model (LLM) integrations.
	Proven experience building production-grade AI applications.
	Background in AI research or published AI-related projects.
	Knowledge of Edge AI and robotics integration.
	Strong analytical thinking and advanced problem-solving capabilities.
	Demonstrated experience in mentoring engineers and building AI development teams.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV&nbsp;to:&nbsp;recruitment@uniccongroup.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-03-25",

AI Specialist Engineer Job at Uniccon Group




        
    

        
        Uniccon Group of Companies a leading African tech conglomerate revolutionizing industries through cutting-edge AI, robotics, drone technology, and smart enterprise solutions. We are dedicated to shaping the future of technology, delivering value to businesses, governments, and individuals across the continent and beyond.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: AI Specialist Engineer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time / Hybrid / Contract

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly skilled AI Specialist Engineer to design, develop, and deploy advanced artificial intelligence solutions that address complex business challenges.
	This role combines technical expertise, leadership capability, and strategic thinking to translate business problems into scalable AI-powered solutions.
	The successful candidate will lead the development of machine learning systems and collaborate with engineering teams to integrate AI capabilities into mobile and backend platforms.


Key Responsibilities
Technical Leadership:


	Lead the architecture, development, and deployment of AI and machine learning solutions.
	Design scalable AI systems, including:
	Natural Language Processing (NLP)
	Machine Learning models
	Deep Learning architectures
	Generative AI models
	Oversee the full AI development lifecycle, including:
	Data collection
	Data preprocessing
	Feature engineering
	Model training pipelines
	Ensure model optimization, performance tuning, and continuous monitoring in production environments.
	Guide the development and implementation of AI APIs and microservices for integration with mobile applications and backend systems.


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or a related field.
	Minimum of 5+ years of experience in AI/ML development.
	At least 2+ years of experience leading or managing technical teams.
	Strong proficiency in Python for machine learning and AI development.


Experience working with AI/ML frameworks such as:


	TensorFlow
	PyTorch
	Scikit-learn
	Strong understanding of:
	Natural Language Processing (NLP)
	Deep Learning techniques
	Predictive modeling
	Experience building and integrating REST APIs with backend systems.
	Knowledge of cloud platforms and containerization technologies, including:
	Docker
	Kubernetes
	Experience using Git and CI/CD pipelines for development and deployment workflows.


Preferred Qualifications


	Experience working with conversational AI systems and Large Language Model (LLM) integrations.
	Proven experience building production-grade AI applications.
	Background in AI research or published AI-related projects.
	Knowledge of Edge AI and robotics integration.
	Strong analytical thinking and advanced problem-solving capabilities.
	Demonstrated experience in mentoring engineers and building AI development teams.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources (HR) Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time


	We are seeking a dedicated and professional Human Resources (HR) Officer to manage and support the hotel&rsquo;s human resource functions.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for recruitment, employee relations, performance management, and ensuring that HR policies and procedures are effectively implemented to support the hotel&rsquo;s operational goals.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage the recruitment and selection process, including job postings, interviews, and onboarding of new employees.
	Maintain accurate employee records, contracts, and HR documentation.
	Develop and implement HR policies and procedures in line with company standards and labor regulations.
	Coordinate staff training, development programs, and performance evaluations.
	Handle employee relations matters, including grievances, disciplinary actions, and conflict resolution.
	Monitor employee attendance, leave records, and ensure proper documentation.
	Support payroll preparation by providing relevant employee information such as attendance and leave records.
	Ensure compliance with labor laws, health and safety regulations, and hotel policies.
	Promote a positive work culture and support staff engagement initiatives.
	Prepare HR reports and provide recommendations to management on workforce planning and improvements.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;greywoodjobs@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Human Resources (HR) Officer Job at Greywood Hotels & Apartments




        
    

        
        Greywood Hotels & Apartments is situated in a serene and well-secured environment. We pride ourselves in providing clean and comfortable accomodation to all our guests which includes work professionals, corporate entities etc. If perfect relexationis your desire, Greywood Hotels & Apartments is definitely the ideal place to be.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources (HR) Officer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a dedicated and professional Human Resources (HR) Officer to manage and support the hotel’s human resource functions.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for recruitment, employee relations, performance management, and ensuring that HR policies and procedures are effectively implemented to support the hotel’s operational goals.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage the recruitment and selection process, including job postings, interviews, and onboarding of new employees.
	Maintain accurate employee records, contracts, and HR documentation.
	Develop and implement HR policies and procedures in line with company standards and labor regulations.
	Coordinate staff training, development programs, and performance evaluations.
	Handle employee relations matters, including grievances, disciplinary actions, and conflict resolution.
	Monitor employee attendance, leave records, and ensure proper documentation.
	Support payroll preparation by providing relevant employee information such as attendance and leave records.
	Ensure compliance with labor laws, health and safety regulations, and hotel policies.
	Promote a positive work culture and support staff engagement initiatives.
	Prepare HR reports and provide recommendations to management on workforce planning and improvements.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

  "description": "Macden Communications Limited is into the supply and distribution of beverages and is a major distributor for International Breweries PLC, Nigerian Breweris Limited and Guiness Nigerian Limited.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Care Service Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Interact with customers to solve issuesand questions about products
	Maintain a positive tone ith the customers at all times
	Establish new customer accounts and record accounts information like phone numbers, addresses
	Listen to customers complaint and identify the cause of their problems
	Identify the appropriate response and strategy to solve customers issues as quickly as possible
	Ensure customer satisfaction and maintain professional customer support.


Requirements


	The company is looking for young and fresh graduates with working experience as a customer care representative of between 1 - 3 years.
	Interested applicants should be resident within Ogba, Ikeja, Agege, Ojodu, Berger. Denro, Ojota, Ketu and other surrounding environments.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;patricia_asemota@yahoo.com&nbsp;using the Job Position&nbsp; as the subject of the mail.

Note


	The working time and days are from 8am to 6pm and from Mondays to Saturdays and Public Holidays.
	For more inquiries, candidates should call: 09063461304.

Customer Care Service Representative Job at Macden Communications Limited




        
    

        
        Macden Communications Limited is into the supply and distribution of beverages and is a major distributor for International Breweries PLC, Nigerian Breweris Limited and Guiness Nigerian Limited.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Care Service Representative

Job Location: Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Interact with customers to solve issuesand questions about products
	Maintain a positive tone ith the customers at all times
	Establish new customer accounts and record accounts information like phone numbers, addresses
	Listen to customers complaint and identify the cause of their problems
	Identify the appropriate response and strategy to solve customers issues as quickly as possible
	Ensure customer satisfaction and maintain professional customer support.


Requirements


	The company is looking for young and fresh graduates with working experience as a customer care representative of between 1 - 3 years.
	Interested applicants should be resident within Ogba, Ikeja, Agege, Ojodu, Berger. Denro, Ojota, Ketu and other surrounding environments.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position  as the subject of the mail.

Note


	The working time and days are from 8am to 6pm and from Mondays to Saturdays and Public Holidays.
	For more inquiries, candidates should call: 09063461304.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Pharmacist",
  "description": "EHA Clinics, a subsidiary of eHealth Africa, is a health care network operating across Nigeria that provides high-quality, innovative, data-driven, and technology-enabled services. EHA Clinics delivers a comprehensive range of state of the art health care services in each location, e.g,&nbsp; general consultations, laboratory investigations, pharmaceuticals, annual medical checks, child wellness checks, ultrasonography, and specialized services (urgent care, telemedicine, home care, dental care, and ophthalmology).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Pharmacist

Job Location:&nbsp;Kano
Department:&nbsp;Pharmacy
Reports to:&nbsp;Assistant Manager, Pharmacy Operations

Mission Objective


	The pharmacy unit provides medical support services in pharmacotherapy, critical to achieving the organization&rsquo;s mission through supplying quality medications, rational medicine usage, and optimizing patients&rsquo; treatment outcomes through appropriate counseling.


Duties and Responsibilities
Purpose:


	Provide&nbsp;effective medication use and become the people&rsquo;s trusted ally against health issues that way, you can deliver maximum value to both the pharmacy and society. Review and develop the clinic&#39;s pharmacy policies and regulations.
	Participate in voluntary community health activities to promote, maintain and restore health and prevent diseases. Manage clinical risk.
	Provide professional advice on cosmetics or para-pharmaceuticals.


Engagement:


	Document patient and family education. Develop and implement the teaching plan utilizing the patient education manual. Think critically in adapting to change, judging situations, and taking appropriate decisions.
	Adhere to EHA Clinics Code of Conduct as well as ethical standards of the field.
	Interpret symptoms so that the patient can either be given immediate treatment for a trifling condition or be referred to the doctor. Protect patients and technicians by adhering to infection-control protocols. Provide emotional support and measures to alleviate fear and anxiety.
	Provide pharmaceutical care services which may include, but are not limited to, patient needs assessment, age and disease-specific drug therapy and patient education, care adjustments based on patient response, and clinical interventions to identify, minimize, and avoid adverse drug reactions.


Delivery:


	Prepare and dispense medications to patients on physician&rsquo;s order. Organize the pharmacy in an efficient manner to make the identification of products easier and faster.
	Maintain an up-to-date inventory of the clinic drug formulary. Records of all drugs, doses, and prices on the automated inventory of the clinic. Review, analyze and respond to different situations encountered daily.
	Review and execute physician&rsquo;s prescriptions checking their appropriateness and legality. Maintain full control over delivering, stocking, and labeling medicine and other products. Develop effective medication plans to minimize the risk of adverse side effects.
	Maintain pharmacological knowledge by attending educational workshops; reviewing professional publications; establishing personal networks; and participating in professional societies.


Targeted Specializes Knowledge


	Minimum qualification of Bachelor&#39;s degree in Pharmacy/M.Pharm/PharmD Minimum of two (2) years of post NYSC progressive experience in Pharmacy within the private and public sector.
	Experience working with public health and health systems is an advantage.
	Candidates must be a registered member of Pharmacists Council of Nigeria (PCN) with an up-to-date practicing license.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-10",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-11",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "EHA Clinics"
    
  },

Pharmacist Job at EHA Clinics




        
    

        
        EHA Clinics, a subsidiary of eHealth Africa, is a health care network operating across Nigeria that provides high-quality, innovative, data-driven, and technology-enabled services. EHA Clinics delivers a comprehensive range of state of the art health care services in each location, e.g,  general consultations, laboratory investigations, pharmaceuticals, annual medical checks, child wellness checks, ultrasonography, and specialized services (urgent care, telemedicine, home care, dental care, and ophthalmology).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Pharmacist

Job Location: Kano
Department: Pharmacy
Reports to: Assistant Manager, Pharmacy Operations
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Mission Objective


	The pharmacy unit provides medical support services in pharmacotherapy, critical to achieving the organization’s mission through supplying quality medications, rational medicine usage, and optimizing patients’ treatment outcomes through appropriate counseling.


Duties and Responsibilities
Purpose:


	Provide effective medication use and become the people’s trusted ally against health issues that way, you can deliver maximum value to both the pharmacy and society. Review and develop the clinic's pharmacy policies and regulations.
	Participate in voluntary community health activities to promote, maintain and restore health and prevent diseases. Manage clinical risk.
	Provide professional advice on cosmetics or para-pharmaceuticals.


Engagement:


	Document patient and family education. Develop and implement the teaching plan utilizing the patient education manual. Think critically in adapting to change, judging situations, and taking appropriate decisions.
	Adhere to EHA Clinics Code of Conduct as well as ethical standards of the field.
	Interpret symptoms so that the patient can either be given immediate treatment for a trifling condition or be referred to the doctor. Protect patients and technicians by adhering to infection-control protocols. Provide emotional support and measures to alleviate fear and anxiety.
	Provide pharmaceutical care services which may include, but are not limited to, patient needs assessment, age and disease-specific drug therapy and patient education, care adjustments based on patient response, and clinical interventions to identify, minimize, and avoid adverse drug reactions.


Delivery:


	Prepare and dispense medications to patients on physician’s order. Organize the pharmacy in an efficient manner to make the identification of products easier and faster.
	Maintain an up-to-date inventory of the clinic drug formulary. Records of all drugs, doses, and prices on the automated inventory of the clinic. Review, analyze and respond to different situations encountered daily.
	Review and execute physician’s prescriptions checking their appropriateness and legality. Maintain full control over delivering, stocking, and labeling medicine and other products. Develop effective medication plans to minimize the risk of adverse side effects.
	Maintain pharmacological knowledge by attending educational workshops; reviewing professional publications; establishing personal networks; and participating in professional societies.


Targeted Specializes Knowledge


	Minimum qualification of Bachelor's degree in Pharmacy/M.Pharm/PharmD Minimum of two (2) years of post NYSC progressive experience in Pharmacy within the private and public sector.
	Experience working with public health and health systems is an advantage.
	Candidates must be a registered member of Pharmacists Council of Nigeria (PCN) with an up-to-date practicing license.
